output_fields.name: linked_message_id
output_fields.notes: must be one of the provided context or explicit reply message IDs for linked decisions; use empty string for a brand new candidate or no_action

output_fields.name: summary
output_fields.notes: human-readable todo summary; required for create_candidate, update_candidate, acknowledge, cancel_candidate; empty string for no_action

output_fields.name: assignees
output_fields.notes: visible assignee names only; use empty array when no assignee is visible

output_fields.name: due_text
output_fields.notes: original due-time wording; do not normalize dates; use empty string when absent

output_fields.name: missing_fields
output_fields.notes: required and non-empty for needs_more_info; use empty array otherwise
